hyperedges.label: Authority Enforcement Pipeline
Bounded Email Workflow Security Flow
OpenSpec Development Change Lifecycle
Gate Enforcement Flow: action request evaluated against task grant to produce gate decision with audit
Authority Composition Pipeline: event + identity + route + policy compose into task grant via deny-by-default
Selected-Thread Email Preview Workflow: selection token gates read, model gateway processes, preview output produced
Gate Enforcement Mechanism: action_request evaluated by gate() against task_grant producing gate_decision
Digest-Bound Approval System: immutable_draft_artifact hashed to payload_digest and target_digest bound in approval_record
Authority Materialization Pipeline: deny_by_default authority_composition produces task_grant consumed by gate_function
OpenSpine Authority Enforcement Pipeline
Email Privacy Containment Pattern
OpenSpine Implementation Slice Sequence
